cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Here's the reason why users reported this game extension as 'borked' = it won't start, if you use it's own (SteamID) "Play" button in the Steam Client (unlike with WindowsOS). But this is an EXTENSION TO RACE07! So - if you start RACE07, ALL CONTENT IS AVAILABLE & INSTALLED. You just start Race07 (which runs fine in WINE/Proton) and you will find and play everything from your GTR Evolution installation! Go, have fun!
title: GTR Evolution Expansion Pack for RACE 07

notes: Runs perfectly if you start Race 07 and not GTR Evoultion
title: GTR Evolution Expansion Pack for RACE 07
